name: Synlig AEO Service
description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) service for Norwegian businesses. We help local businesses become visible in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview through schema.org markup, Google Business Profile optimization, and AI-optimized content.

skills.name: Free AEO Audit
skills.description: Instant AI-visibility audit for any Norwegian business website. Returns score (0-100), grade (A-F), and prioritized recommendations. Free, no signup required.
examples: Audit the AEO score for https://example.no
How visible is this business in AI search?

endpointParams.url: required — the website URL to audit

skills.name: AEO Implementation Service
skills.description: Full AEO implementation: schema.org markup, Google Business Profile optimization, AI-optimized content, and ongoing monitoring. For Norwegian businesses, 5,000–30,000 NOK.

supportedInterfaces.description: Free AEO audit endpoint. GET ?url=<website> returns JSON with score (0-100), grade (A-F), and prioritized recommendations.
